{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Farlet Museum of Technological History
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Farlet Museum of Technological History]] contains a wing called the Development of Human Technology.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
